mapper.sql: SELECT rule_id, rule_code, rule_name, warning_type, warning_level, threshold, operator, enabled, rule_config, order_num, remark, del_flag, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time FROM invest_warning_rule
mapper.select: WHERE del_flag = '0' AND enabled = '1' ORDER BY order_num ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE invest_warning_rule SET rule_code = #{ruleCode}, rule_name = #{ruleName}, warning_type = #{warningType}, warning_level = #{warningLevel}, threshold = #{threshold}, operator = #{operator}, enabled = #{enabled}, rule_config = #{ruleConfig}, order_num = #{orderNum}, remark = #{remark}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = #{updateTime} WHERE rule_id = #{ruleId}
